content_markdown:
# Brewing Hearts for God

## Scripture

"But the Lord said to me, 'Do not say, "I am too young." You must go to everyone I send you to and say whatever I command you.'" - Jeremiah 1:7 (NIV)

## Reflection

Just as a good cup of coffee requires careful roasting, selecting the right beans, and precise brewing, our hearts need to be refined for God's work. When we feel too young or inadequate, we must remember that our strength comes from Him. As we prepare for our day, we can pour over our Bible and listen for His voice, just as we carefully pour over the coffee grounds to extract the perfect flavor. Just as the crema forms on a well-made latte, our character is shaped by our relationship with God. We must be willing to be refined, just as coffee beans are roasted to bring out their full potential. In this process, we become more like Him, and our presence in the world makes a richer aroma.

## Prayer

We ask that You would help us identify and refine our hearts for Your work in the world. Help us to listen for Your voice and respond with obedience.

## One-Line Application
Let our hearts be refined for God's work, just as coffee beans are roasted for a rich flavor.
